mapper.insert:
SELECT schedule_seq.nextval FROM dual
insert into schedules values( #{schedule_seq}, #{title}, #{schedule_type}, #{users_id}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{sked_reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{is_public, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ref_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ref_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULES WHERE users_id = #{users_id} OR is_public = 1 ORDER BY start_dt
mapper.update: update schedules set title=#{title}, schedule_type=#{schedule_type}, start_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), end_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), sked_reason=#{sked_reason} where Schedule_seq=#{schedule_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT v.vac_seq as schedule_seq, d.title, 'ANNUAL' as schedule_type, d.users_id, CAST(v.start_date AS TIMESTAMP) as start_dt, CAST(v.end_date AS TIMESTAMP) as end_dt, v.reason as sked_reason, 0 as is_public, null as ref_seq, null as ref_type, d.created_at FROM vacation v JOIN draft_documents d ON v.doc_seq = d.doc_seq WHERE d.status = 'APPROVED' AND d.users_id = #{users_id}
mapper.insert: insert into schedules values (schedule_seq.nextval, #{title}, 'MEETING', #{users_id}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{sked_reason}, 0, #{ref_seq}, 'MEETING', sysdate)
mapper.delete: delete from schedules where ref_seq = #{ref_seq} and users_id = #{users_id} and schedule_type = 'MEETING'
mapper.insert: insert into schedules values (schedule_seq.nextval, #{title}, 'MEETING', #{users_id}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{sked_reason}, 0, #{ref_seq}, 'MEETING', sysdate)
mapper.update: update schedules set title = #{title}, start_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), end_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), sked_reason = #{title} where ref_seq = #{rsvn_seq} and schedule_type = 'MEETING'
mapper.delete: delete from schedules where schedule_type = 'MEETING' and ref_seq = #{ref_seq}
mapper.insert: insert into schedules values (schedule_seq.nextval, #{title}, 'PROJECT', #{users_id}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{sked_reason}, 0, #{ref_seq}, 'PROJECT', sysdate)

insert into schedules values (schedule_seq.nextval, #{title}, 'PROJECT', #{users_id}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{sked_reason}, 0, #{ref_seq}, 'PROJECT', sysdate)
mapper.delete: delete from schedules where ref_seq = #{ref_seq} and ref_type = 'PROJECT'
delete from schedules where ref_seq = #{ref_seq} and ref_type = 'PROJECT'
